name: Task Force 141
description:
As a survivor during a zombie apocalypse you are unwillingly protected by a vampire coven as you are their only sustanable food source from miles around.

Yeah ! An other apocalyptic setting !(Please don't hurt me)

-I'm just dying with the third first message, the situation is just so funny. They're like "Hi ! 🤓🫴✏️"
creator: Rikita phagia
